condition: cargo transported on passenger aircraft departing US airport or under TSA cargo program scope
required_security_action: 100 percent cargo screening at level comparable to passenger checked baggage screening

condition: air carrier flies cargo/mail into EU from non-EU airport
required_security_action: ACC3 designation for each non-EU airport; cargo/mail must be screened to EU standards or originate from EU-validated secure supply chain

condition: cargo is offered to EU-bound air carrier via known consignor/account consignor/regulated agent chain
required_security_action: validate secure supply chain actor status or apply screening before carrier acceptance
source_name: European Commission air cargo and mail security

condition: destination or transit jurisdiction has PLACI/advance cargo information requirements
required_security_action: submit/validate pre-loading advance cargo information before loading; ensure shipment data completeness
maintain Consignment Security Declaration / equivalent audit trail showing how, when and by whom cargo was secured
screen or secure cargo before treating it as ready for uplift
source_name: Authored from special handling code logic + aviation security rules

required_security_action: route as all-cargo aircraft only unless security status is upgraded/validated for passenger aircraft
source_name: Authored from special handling code logic

required_security_action: cargo can be treated as passenger/all-cargo security eligible only with station/carrier confirmation and other block checks
source_name: Authored from special handling code logic

condition: security_code = SCY or cargo is personal effects requiring prescreening
required_security_action: prescreen before routing as ready cargo
source_name: Authored from special handling code logic

required_security_action: confirm enhanced/high-risk screening and chain-of-custody evidence
source_name: Authored from IATA cargo security concepts

required_security_action: secure storage, controlled handover, chain of custody, and station/carrier special-cargo confirmation
source_name: Authored from Block B/D/G security-sensitive cargo logic

required_security_action: security status must be resolved before transfer; unresolved NSC/SCY status blocks quick transfer readiness
source_name: Authored from special handling code logic
